skills.description: Expert in modern CI/CD practices, GitOps workflows, and container orchestration, specializing in zero-downtime deployments, progressive delivery, and enterprise-scale automation.
trigger_conditions: Designing or improving CI/CD pipelines and release workflows
Implementing GitOps or progressive delivery patterns
anti_triggers: Application feature work without deployment changes

skills.description: Architecture patterns for multi-stage CI/CD pipelines with approval gates and deployment strategies.
Guide developers through setting up development environments with proper tools, dependencies, and configurations
trigger_conditions: Use when starting a new project and need to set up the development environment
Use when onboarding new team members to a project
Use when switching to a new machine or operating system
anti_triggers: Use when only making minor changes to an existing setup

skills.description: Master advanced Git techniques to maintain clean history, collaborate effectively, and recover from any situation with confidence.
trigger_conditions: Cleaning up commit history before merging
Recovering from Git mistakes or lost commits
anti_triggers: The task is unrelated to git advanced workflows

skills.description: Production-ready GitHub Actions workflow patterns for testing, building, and deploying applications.
trigger_conditions: Build Docker images and push to registries
Implement matrix builds for multiple environments
anti_triggers: The task is unrelated to github actions templates
You need a different domain or tool outside this scope
